title: AspireLens – AI-Powered Career Counselling
description: An AI-driven platform helping students discover ideal career paths through aptitude analysis and personalized recommendations powered by GROQ API.

title: Ecolocator – E-Waste Facility Locator
description: A web application to find certified e-waste recycling centers near you using interactive maps, pincode search, and facility type filtering.
features: Search by pincode, state, or facility type
Real-time facility data from JSON datasets

title: EcoRevive – Community Recycling Hub
description: Platform connecting local communities for e-waste awareness and efficient point-to-point recycling coordination.

title: TrackTech – Inventory Management System
description: Smart inventory tracking solution with barcode support and real-time stock notifications.
